Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-AutoRunmode/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-AutoRunmode/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-AutoRunmode/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:14:17 2014	(r352334)
+++ head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-AutoRunmode/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:14:21 2014	(r352335)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	CGI::App plugin to automatically register runmodes
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-CGI-Application>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
